title: #2.23: The woodpecker-skull-collider simulator
description: This episode is very well organized and that probably has something to do with Robin presenting a study concerning woodpeckers' lack of brain injuries and of course his mad hosting skills. Also, Mark reveal his sloth faecal fetish and Flemming tries yet again to advocate alternative medicine - who said there was something wrong with using fish scales instead of good old bandages?
